name: pet-wall-drops-and-fusion
description: Verify coin hatching is disabled, pet eggs drop from depth blocks with pity, deeper tiers unlock stronger pools, and star fusion follows 2 then 3 copies.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local blocked=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value==777 and p.RPGStats.PetInventoryJSON.Value=='[]' a:Invoke('SetStats',{PetDropPity=44}) local drop=a:Invoke('BreakDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=2},2) local dropped=p.RPGStats.PetInventoryJSON.Value:find('Forest Pup',1,true)~=nil and p.RPGStats.PetDropPity.Value==0 a:Invoke('Reset') a:Invoke('GrantPet',{name='Forest Pup',stars=1}) a:Invoke('GrantPet',{name='Forest Pup',stars=1}) local f2=a:Invoke('FusePet','Forest Pup') a:Invoke('GrantPet',{name='Forest Pup',stars=2}) a:Invoke('GrantPet',{name='Forest Pup',stars=2}) local f3=a:Invoke('FusePet','Forest Pup#2') local inv=p.RPGStats.PetInventoryJSON.Value local cfg=require(game.ReplicatedStorage.GameConfig) local depth1,depth62=0,0 for _,pet in ipairs(cfg.Pets) do if pet.minDepth<=1 then depth1+=1 end if pet.minDepth<=62 then depth62+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=blocked and drop.ok==true and dropped and f2.ok==true and f3.ok==true and inv:find('Forest Pup#3',1,true)~=nil and depth1==1 and depth62==5,blocked=blocked,dropped=dropped,pity=p.RPGStats.PetDropPity.Value,fused2=f2.ok,fused3=f3.ok,inventory=inv,depth1Pool=depth1,depth62Pool=depth62})
